25: function ProtectedRoute({ component: Component, requireOwner = false }: { component: any; requireOwner?: boolean }) {
26:   const { user, isLoading } = useAuth();
27:   
28:   if (isLoading) {
29:     return null;
30:   }
31:   
32:   if (!user) {
33:     return <Redirect href="/login" />;
34:   }
35:   
36:   if (requireOwner && user.role !== "owner") {
37:     return <Redirect href="/" />;
38:   }
39:   
40:   return <Component />;
41: }
42: 
43: function Router() {
44:   const { user, isLoading } = useAuth();
45:   
46:   return (
47:     <Switch>
48:       <Route path="/menu-tv" component={MenuTv} />
49:       <Route path="/login" component={Login} />
50:       {!user && !isLoading && (
51:         <Route path="*">
52:           <Redirect href="/login" />
53:         </Route>
54:       )}
55:       <Layout>
56:         <Switch>
57:           <Route path="/" component={Tables} />
58:           <Route path="/orders" component={Orders} />
59:           <Route path="/kitchen" component={Kitchen} />
60:           <Route path="/menu" component={Menu} />
61:           <Route path="/reports" component={Reports} />
62:           <Route path="/history" component={History} />
63:           <Route path="/tables" component={Tables} />
64:           <Route path="/home" component={Home} />
65:           <Route path="/gau-assistant" component={GauAssistant} />
66:           <Route path="/settings" component={Settings} />
67:           <Route path="/profile" component={Profile} />
68:           <Route path="/attendance" component={Attendance} />
69:         </Switch>
70:       </Layout>
71:       <Route component={NotFound} />
72:     </Switch>
73:   );
74: }
75: 
76: function App() {
77:   return (
78:     <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>
79:       <TooltipProvider>
80:         <Toaster />
81:         <PWAInstallPrompt />
82:         <PWAUpdatePrompt />
83:         <AuthProvider>
84:           <Router />
85:         </AuthProvider>
86:       </TooltipProvider>
87:     </QueryClientProvider>
88:   );
89: }

91: export default App;
